answer:
Stripe does not have a free tier for its core payment platform or Billing API; it operates on a pay-as-you-go model with no monthly or setup fees [1][2]. You can self-serve access to the API immediately upon signing up [1][3]. 

You can interact with the API to create products and prices using the `v1/products` or `v1/prices` endpoints [3][4]. For example, to create a price, use:

```bash
curl https://api.stripe.com/v1/prices \
  -u "<<YOUR_SECRET_KEY>>:" \
  -d currency=usd \
  -d unit_amount=1000 \
  -d "recurring[interval]=month" \
  -d "product=PROD_ID"
```

Stripe also allows for a price of zero if you wish to offer a free service [4].
